settings.description: Full ECSI CBSEM from estimate_cbsem() doc example (all items in mm)

lavaanModel:
# Latent Variable Definitions
Image =~ IMAG1 + IMAG2 + IMAG3 + IMAG4 + IMAG5
Quality =~ PERQ1 + PERQ2 + PERQ3 + PERQ4 + PERQ5 + PERQ6 + PERQ7
Value =~ PERV1 + PERV2
Satisfaction =~ CUSA1 + CUSA2 + CUSA3
Complaints =~ CUSCO
CUSCO ~~ 0*CUSCO
Loyalty =~ CUSL1 + CUSL2 + CUSL3

# Regressions
Value ~ Image + Quality
Satisfaction ~ Image + Quality
Complaints ~ Value + Satisfaction
Loyalty ~ Value + Satisfaction + Complaints

# Residual Covariances
IMAG1 ~~ PERQ1
IMAG1 ~~ PERQ2
